title: StateMachine
description: A state machine for one artifact type. Names the legal states, the terminal subset, and the allowed transitions. Each transition records the trigger and an array of free-form condition strings the engine consults; a future pass replaces those strings with executable predicates.

id.description: State machine identifier in kebab-case. Example: spec-lifecycle, run-lifecycle, release-lifecycle.

applies_to.description: Artifact type this machine governs. Must match the enum in artifact.schema.json.

initial_state.description: Name of the state every new artifact starts in. Must appear in states.

name.description: State name. Unique within this machine.

terminal.description: True if no outgoing transitions are legal once the artifact enters this state.

transitions.description: Legal moves between states. The engine rejects any transition not listed.

trigger.description: Event or action that fires the transition. Example: gate.passed, reviewer.approved, deploy.completed.

allowed_if.description: Free-form condition strings that must all hold. Today the engine treats these as documentation; a future pass adds executable predicates.
